text: I feel a gentle curiosity, as if I'm witnessing the intersection of creativity and knowledge. The glass walls separate the bustle of collaboration from the deliberate stillness of observation. As I enter the exhibit marked R+D, I sense the excitement of human innovation. The words on the wall reinforce a sense of thoughtful amusement, inviting me to contemplate how research and playfulness coexist. There is both immediacy and irony here—moments that echo the lightness of being and the surrender to discovery. I feel present, but also slightly detached, as a philosophical observer in a space devoted to reflection and progress.
